title: Elements Glass Apothecary Jars, Set Of 3, Clear, Wedding Decor, Candy Buffet, Bathroom Storage, Table Centerpiece
description:
About this item
SO MANY USES: These apothecary jars are perfect for everything from displaying small accents like flowers, shells, trinkets, or marbles, to storing candy, spices, tea, cotton balls, bath salts and soaps, and so much more.
STUNNINGLY DESIGNED: Featuring staggering heights, sleek silhouettes, and elegant details, these jars display beautifully together as a set, or placed separately throughout the home. Plus, the lids feature pretty and practical handles for easy opening.
BEAUTIFULLY CRAFTED: Made from clear glass that’s both sturdy and stylish, these stunning decorative storage pieces stand up to heavy use, allowing them to add a sophisticated look to tables, counters, shelves, and desks for years to come.
ESSENTIAL HOME SET: This stylish accessory set features three assorted glass jars with lids, measuring 4.33" L x 4.33" W x 10.24" H, 4.33" L x 4.33" W x 9.45" H, and 4.53" L x 4.53" W x 8.27" H.
THE PERFECT GIFT: This lovely set is a great addition to anyone's home, making it the perfect present for birthdays, holidays, weddings, housewarming parties, and other special occasions.
reviews_5s: This makes such a cute little centerpiece for my kitchen island—perfect for storing candy or adding a decorative touch!Perfect size for many thingsThese look so pretty I like to put my wrapped candy in it I wouldn't put unwrapped candy in it unless it was going to be eaten quickly because there isn't a seal but it works great for wrapped candy5 grandchildren several special occasions coming up.These have the look of an old school candy store. I love them. They are a decent size and sturdy.These are great not matter what you want to use them for. Leave them empty and put them on a shelf as decorations; fill them with candy and display them in your office for visitors; utilize them at a wedding or party on a candy buffet. The possibilities are as endless as your imagination. Keep in mind that they are rather small, but super functional. They come packaged in molded styrofoam so they are tightly packed so they won't break. The lids are interchangeable so you can put them on whichever vessel you desire, for a different/unique look.The trio of apothecary jars are smaller than I expected, but still a great set for the price. As you can see, slightly varying designs allow for placement together or alone. Glass thickness of stem base and body is medium- not so delicate that you would be afraid to shatter when you put items in. Lids are heavier than expected (shorter two are thicker and heavier than tall one) and knobs are thick. I’ve always wanted apothecary jars and now I have a quality set. Definitely recommend at this price!These jars are absolutely gorgeous, but very thin, so be sure you aren't using them around kids (or men...lol). I'm using them purely as decorative jars for a guest bathroom for qtips and bath salts, etc. They could be used for candies or just by simply as empty glass jars. They are that pretty.These apothecary jars look just like they do in the advertisement. They remind me of the drinking glasses you can buy in a dollar store. There are a few tiny bubbles, one in a couple of the lids and a few in the bases of 2 of the jars. Not bad and really not noticeable. I had to look really closely to find them. I'm using the large one in the bathroom for Q-tips. The 2 smaller ones are on my desk. The medium sized one is holding colorful clips I use in quilting and the small one has got a combination of butterscotch candies and red/white peppermint meltaway candies. I was going to put each candy in their own jar, but I have to limit myself to the small one and I will not allow myself to refill until the start of a new week. They look nice and the candies and clips are easy to find on my cluttered desk. I'm very happy with these. These jars do have a little rustic feel to their look. As long as you are not looking for fine crystal or the high end of medium glassware, you will be happy as well.Love these! So cute for decor! So many things to put in them. Great for Halloween too.

Salió la copa pequeña y una grande con 2 agujeros y necesito que si me las pueden enviar de nuevo.One jar was broken into pieces. I would not buy.
